testcase.name: tdclient.test
testcase.error: /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/importlib/__init__.py:126: in import_module return _bootstrap._gcd_import(name[level:], package, level) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1204: in _gcd_import ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1176: in _find_and_load ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1126: in _find_and_load_unlocked ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:241: in _call_with_frames_removed ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1204: in _gcd_import ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1176: in _find_and_load ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1126: in _find_and_load_unlocked ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:241: in _call_with_frames_removed ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1204: in _gcd_import ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1176: in _find_and_load ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1147: in _find_and_load_unlocked ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:690: in _load_unlocked ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap_external>:940: in exec_module ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:241: in _call_with_frames_removed ??? tdclient/__init__.py:3: in <module> from tdclient import client, connection, errors, version tdclient/client.py:5: in <module> from tdclient import api, models E File "/Users/nelsonmbigili/Desktop/Spring 2026/Software Analysis/migratelib-artifact/repos/treasure-data@td-client-python__099f9578__urllib3__aiohttp/tdclient/api.py", line 135 E def _init_http(self, http_proxy=None, **kwargs): E ^^^ E IndentationError: expected an indented block after function definition on line 134
